summary: Tested Procurement Approval feature - new approval step in material request flow. All features working correctly. Backend APIs verified: Dashboard includes pending_approval count, GET /api/procurement/requests?status=pending_approval returns planning_approved requests, PATCH /api/procurement/v2/approve/{request_id} changes status correctly. Frontend verified: Approval tab is first/default tab, shows planning_approved requests with Approve/Reject buttons, Vendor Select tab shows only procurement_approved requests.

success_rate.backend: 100% (9 passed, 2 skipped - no planning_approved requests available for approve/reject tests)

seed_data_creation: Approved 1 request (TMT Steel 12mm) and rejected 1 request (M-Sand Fine) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Procurement Approval feature is fully functional. The new flow is: SE creates → Planning Approves → Procurement Approves (NEW) → Vendor Selection → Accounts → PO → Dispatch → Receipt. Dashboard shows pending_approval count (planning_approved requests) and pending_requests count (procurement_approved requests). Approval tab is the first/default tab in Procurement Board V2.

procurement_approval_tab.tab_exists: PASS - Approval tab appears as first tab in Procurement Board V2
procurement_approval_tab.tab_is_default: PASS - Approval tab is active by default (data-state='active')
procurement_approval_tab.request_details: PASS - Each request shows material name, qty, brand, project, SE name
procurement_approval_tab.approve_button: PASS - Approve button present with data-testid
procurement_approval_tab.reject_button: PASS - Reject button present with data-testid

backend_approve_endpoint.approve_action: PASS - PATCH /api/procurement/v2/approve/{request_id} with action=approve changes status to procurement_approved
backend_approve_endpoint.reject_action: PASS - PATCH /api/procurement/v2/approve/{request_id} with action=reject changes status to rejected

dashboard_counts.pending_requests_count: PASS - Dashboard includes pending_requests count (vendor selection)

vendor_selection.shows_procurement_approved: PASS - Vendor Select tab shows only procurement_approved requests
vendor_selection.dialog_works: PASS - Vendor Selection dialog opens with all required fields

backend_api_tests.GET /api/procurement/dashboard: PASS - Returns pending_approval and pending_requests counts
